SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.optic

Class Optics

java.lang.Object
io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.optic.Optics
public final class Optics extends Object
Entry points for functional optics (Lens, Prism, Traversal). Enables composition of functional APIs over nested structures.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> Traversal<Collection<T>,T>
    each()
    Focuses on each element of any functional-java Collection (Maybe, List, etc.).
    static <T> Traversal<List<T>,T>
    list()
    Focuses on each element of a List.
    static <K, V> Traversal<HashMap<K,V>,V>
    mapValues()
    Focuses on each value within a HashMap.
    static <T> Traversal<Maybe<T>,T>
    maybe()
    Focuses on the value inside a Maybe, if it exists.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • each

      public static <T> Traversal<Collection<T>,T> each()
      Focuses on each element of any functional-java Collection (Maybe, List, etc.). Equivalent to 'traverse' in Haskell.

    • list

      public static <T> Traversal<List<T>,T> list()
      Focuses on each element of a List.

    • maybe

      public static <T> Traversal<Maybe<T>,T> maybe()
      Focuses on the value inside a Maybe, if it exists.

    • mapValues

      public static <K, V> Traversal<HashMap<K,V>,V> mapValues()
      Focuses on each value within a HashMap.
